_comment: LISTEN HISTORY COLLECTION — Root collection: each document represents a single play event. Kept as a separate collection (not embedded in users) because listen events grow unboundedly — embedding millions of records inside each user document would exceed MongoDB's 16MB doc limit. Embeds: a lightweight song snapshot (denormalized title, artist, album) so most queries can be answered without joining to the artists collection. References: userID → users._id, songID → artists.albums.songs.songID
_docComment: Example Document 1 — Full listen (playDuration close to song duration)

song._comment: Embedded: denormalized song info for fast reads (absorbs SONG join)
song.title: Midnight Rain

_docComment: Example Document 2 — Partial listen / skip (user stopped early)
